# OneStar

> OneStar helps local and physical businesses turn online reviews, including negative ones, into a trust asset through reputation management, Google Business Profile management, websites, and an AI-powered QR review system.

OneStar is a digital services agency for brick-and-mortar businesses such as gyms, restaurants, and local shops. The name refers to the 1-star review: people read negative reviews first, and a professionally handled negative review builds more trust than hundreds of unanswered 5-star ratings. OneStar monitors reviews, writes professional public responses, and turns real criticism into displayed trust. The first consultation is free. Content is available in English and Spanish.

## Pages

- [Home](https://onestar.cloud/): Overview of OneStar services for local businesses, in English
- [Home (Spanish)](https://onestar.cloud/es): Overview of OneStar services, in Spanish
- [Contact](https://onestar.cloud/contact): Get in touch for a free first consultation
- [Contact (Spanish)](https://onestar.cloud/es/contact): Contact page in Spanish
- [Affiliate Program](https://onestar.cloud/affiliate): Earn a 10% perpetual commission on referred sales
- [Privacy Policy](https://onestar.cloud/privacy-policy): How OneStar handles personal data
- [Terms of Service](https://onestar.cloud/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of OneStar services

## Services

- Review & Reputation Management: monitoring of online reviews and professional public responses, especially to negative reviews, turning criticism into trust
- Google Business Profile Management: setup, optimization, and ongoing upkeep of Google Business Profiles for local visibility
- Website Creation & Optimization: fast, modern websites for local businesses, built and optimized for search and conversions
- AI-Powered QR Review System: QR codes placed in the physical business that make it easy for customers to leave reviews, assisted by AI

## Contact

- Email: hi@onestar.cloud
